scripts.build:all: node ../scripts/readme/refresh-badges.mjs build 1 && node ../scripts/readme/run-badged-command.mjs build "npm run build"
scripts.tests:all: npm run build:all && npm run quality:check:all && npm run security:check:all && npm run test:all
scripts.quality:check:all: node ../scripts/readme/refresh-badges.mjs quality 1 && node ../scripts/readme/run-badged-command.mjs quality "npm run quality:format:check:all && npm run quality:lint:check:all && npm run quality:type:all"
scripts.quality:format:check:all: npm run quality:format:check:sdk && npm run quality:format:check:manager && npm run quality:format:check:node && npm run quality:terraform:format:check
scripts.quality:format:fix:all: npm run quality:format:fix:sdk && npm run quality:format:fix:manager && npm run quality:format:fix:node && npm run quality:terraform:format:fix
scripts.quality:lint:check:all: npm run quality:lint:check:sdk && npm run quality:lint:check:manager
scripts.quality:lint:fix:all: npm run quality:lint:fix:sdk && npm run quality:lint:fix:manager
scripts.quality:type:all: npm run quality:type:node && npm run quality:type:sdk && npm run quality:type:ts
scripts.security:check:all: node ../scripts/readme/refresh-badges.mjs security 1 && node ../scripts/readme/run-badged-command.mjs security "npm run security:audit:all"
scripts.security:audit:all: npm run security:audit:midgard && npm run security:audit:sdk && npm run security:audit:node && npm run security:audit:ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit:all && npm run test:unit:coverage:all && npm run test:integration:all && npm run test:e2e:all
scripts.test:unit:all: node ../scripts/readme/refresh-badges.mjs unit 1 && node ../scripts/readme/run-badged-command.mjs unit "npm run test:unit:node && npm run test:unit:sdk && npm run test:unit:ts"
scripts.test:unit:node: pnpm --dir midgard-node exec vitest run --root .. --config vitest/node.unit.config.mts midgard-node/tests/unit
scripts.test:integration:all: node ../scripts/readme/refresh-badges.mjs integration 1 && node ../scripts/readme/run-badged-command.mjs integration "npm run test:integration:node && npm run test:integration:sdk"
scripts.test:integration:node: pnpm --dir midgard-node exec vitest run --root .. --config vitest/node.integration.config.mts midgard-node/tests/integration
scripts.test:integration:sdk: pnpm --dir midgard-node exec vitest run --root .. --config vitest/sdk.integration.config.mts
scripts.test:e2e:all: node ../scripts/readme/refresh-badges.mjs e2e 1 && node ../scripts/readme/run-badged-command.mjs e2e "npm run test:legacy"
scripts.test:legacy:all: npm --prefix midgard-node run test && npm --prefix midgard-sdk run test && npm --prefix midgard-ts run test
scripts.test:unit:coverage:node: node ../scripts/readme/refresh-badges.mjs node-coverage 1 && node ../scripts/readme/run-badged-command.mjs node-coverage "pnpm --dir midgard-node exec vitest run --root .. --config vitest/node.coverage.config.mts --coverage"
scripts.test:unit:coverage:sdk: node ../scripts/readme/refresh-badges.mjs sdk-coverage 1 && node ../scripts/readme/run-badged-command.mjs sdk-coverage "vitest run --config vitest/sdk.coverage.config.mts --coverage"
scripts.test:unit:coverage:ts: node ../scripts/readme/refresh-badges.mjs ts-coverage 1 && node ../scripts/readme/run-badged-command.mjs ts-coverage "vitest run --config vitest/ts.coverage.config.mts --coverage"
scripts.test:unit:coverage:all: npm run test:unit:coverage:node && npm run test:unit:coverage:sdk && npm run test:unit:coverage:ts
